summary: Replace the accepted-but-ineffective CDP Input.insertText command with a bounded Chromium editing command after exact clean evidence proved the former returned success without changing the focused React textarea.

decisions.decision: Keep exact WebDriver element resolution, click, focus, selection, current-page discovery, loopback/same-port validation, byte/event/time bounds, secret-free errors, socket cleanup, and the two-read React commit oracle. Replace only CDP Input.insertText with one Runtime.evaluate call that revalidates the active connected enabled textarea, selects its contents, invokes Chromium's insertText editing command, and returns three fixed-name booleans proving command acceptance, retained focus, and immediate value equality.
decisions.rationale: The exact clean 18fcf89 Sandbox run proved the page target, element, focus, selection, protocol response, and cleanup while the Message value still remained empty and the mock received zero requests. A same-target browser editing command is a distinct automated boundary that avoids another WebDriver or CDP key-input retry and remains independently checked by later React value reads.

testEvidence.criterion: The exact validated CDP page target must execute a bounded browser editing operation only against the focused textarea and reject a no-op, wrong target, protocol error, malformed result, or lost focus without retaining message content.
testEvidence.test: Inspect the emitted Runtime.evaluate command, require its editing operation and return-by-value contract, inject both accepted and rejected fixed-shape results, and retain all existing discovery, transport, redaction, timeout, cleanup, focus, and React-commit regressions.

red.command: Exact clean packaged Windows Sandbox run bound to commit 18fcf892fe634f963b80a266f2787b07556c7cdc and tree 93842c13293a08f4546d65fd7692383fbe36619a
red.outcome: RUNTIME RED: the source-bound build and thirteen preceding guest events passed, CDP Input.insertText returned success on the exact focused page target, but two committed reads remained empty and the safe AI mock received zero requests. Cleanup passed. This is failed evidence, not a packaged pass.

green.outcome: GREEN: the exact helper suite passed 55/55, including the Runtime.evaluate editing command, rejected no-op result, loopback/current-page validation, protocol redaction, bounds, acknowledged cleanup, exact focus, and two-read React commit oracle. Exact clean WebView2 runtime behavior remains unproven until the single permitted Sandbox run.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean packaged M4 walkthrough on candidate 18fcf892fe634f963b80a266f2787b07556c7cdc
nearMisses.confirmation: The exact build, cube, export, MCP off/on/off, fixed WebView2 150, pinned engine, and disabled-soak phases passed. Input.insertText returned protocol success but did not change the controlled Message textarea; the mock saw zero requests. Sandbox exit and staging cleanup passed.

questions: No owner decision is required. The editing-command contract is locally proven; one exact clean source-bound Sandbox run will decide this distinct hypothesis and will not be blindly retried.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
